videoSnippet.title: They Meet Again! || Magnus Carlsen vs Vasyl Ivanchuk || FIDE World Rapid Team Championships 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Carlsen, Magnus (2832) - Ivanchuk, Vasyl (2622)
FIDE World Rapid & Blitz Team Chess Championships 2026 (Chess.com) [03] 2026.06.17
E46 Nimzo-Indian, 4.e3 O-O

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nc3 Bb4 4.e3 O-O 5.Bd2 d5 6.Nf3 b6 7.cxd5 exd5 8.Rc1 a6 9.Bd3 Bd6 10.O-O Re8 11.a3 Bb7 12.Ne2 Nbd7 13.Ng3 Ne4 14.Qe2 c5 15.dxc5 bxc5 16.Rfd1 Qb6 17.Be1 Ndf6 18.Nf5 Bf8 19.b4 Bc8 20.bxc5 Bxc5 21.N5d4 Bxa3 22.Rc6 Qb2 23.Qf1 Bd6 24.Bxa6 Bd7 25.Rcc1 Reb8 26.Bd3 Qa2 27.Rb1 h6 28.Qe2 Qa3 29.Nb5 Bxb5 30.Bxb5 Nc3 31.Bxc3 Qxc3 32.Nd4 g6 33.h3 Kg7 34.Rdc1 Qa3 35.Qd1 Rc8 36.Bc6 Rab8 37.Ra1 Qb2 38.Rcb1 Qc3 39.Bb7 Rf8 40.Rc1 Qb4 41.Rab1 Qa3 42.Nb5 Qa5 43.Nxd6 Qd8 44.Rc6 Qe7 45.Qd4 Rfd8 46.Rbb6 Kg8 47.Nc8
